description.value: **Benefit:** The frost of your cold spell clings to the target, impeding it for a short time. A rime spell causes creatures that takes cold damage from the spell to become entangled for a number of rounds equal to the original level of the spell. This feat only affects spells with the cold descriptor. Level Increase: +1 (a rime spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell’s actual level.)
